title: Removal from List of NAIFs by AllCap Multi-Fund Platform SICAV plc
text:
LEI Code: 5299007TB6615KIB9859 
 This notice is to make the general public aware that Audentia Capital Management Ltd (“the AIFM”) requested the Malta Financial Services Authority (“MFSA”) to accept the removal of Audentia World FX Fund (“the Sub-Fund”) from the MFSA’s list of Notified AIFs (“NAIFs”). This removal is entirely voluntary and does not arise as a result of any regulatory action taken by the MFSA. Accordingly, with effect from 16 April 2026 , the Sub-Fund ceased to form part of the MFSA’s list of NAIFs.
